# Arcanea — Complete AI Reference

> For AI agents, crawlers, and developers building on the Arcanea platform

## MCP Tool Schemas (42 tools)

### World-Building Generators

#### generate_character
Create a character with Gates, Elements, House, and backstory.
Parameters:
- primaryElement: Fire | Water | Earth | Wind | Void | Spirit
- house: Lumina | Nero | Pyros | Aqualis | Terra | Ventus | Synthesis
- gatesOpen: 1-10 (determines rank: 1-2=Apprentice, 3-4=Mage, 5-6=Master, 7-8=Archmage, 9-10=Luminor)
- archetype: string (personality description)
- nameGender: masculine | feminine | neutral
Returns: Character blueprint with name, personality (traits, flaw, desire, fear, secret), backstory, abilities, magic style, narrative hooks.

#### generate_location
Create a location with elemental alignment.
Parameters:
- dominantElement: Fire | Water | Earth | Wind | Void | Spirit
- type: string (temple, forest, city, dungeon, void-rift, etc.)
- alignment: light | dark | balanced
Returns: Location blueprint with name, atmosphere (visual, sound, smell), features, history, secret, narrative hooks.

#### generate_creature
Design a magical creature.
Parameters:
- element: Fire | Water | Earth | Wind | Void | Spirit
- size: tiny | small | medium | large | massive
- temperament: hostile | neutral | friendly | sacred
Returns: Creature blueprint with name, species, appearance, behavior, abilities, habitat, lore (Godbeast connection), narrative hooks.

#### generate_quest
Generate a quest from world state — auto-links existing characters, locations, and creatures.
Parameters:
- sessionId: string (optional, links to existing creations)
Returns: Quest with title, type, hook, objective, stakes, complications (3), rewards (tangible + intangible), involved creations, difficulty.

#### generate_artifact
Create a magical artifact with history and powers.
Parameters:
- element: Fire | Water | Earth | Wind | Void | Spirit
- type: string (weapon, crown, mirror, key, seed, etc.)
- power: minor | moderate | major | legendary
Returns: Artifact blueprint with name, material, appearance, abilities (primary, secondary, cost), requirement, lore, narrative hooks.

#### generate_magic
Design a magical ability.
Parameters:
- element: Fire | Water | Earth | Wind | Void | Spirit (required)
- gateLevel: 1-10 (required)
- purpose: string (what the magic does)
Returns: Magic blueprint with name, gate required, guardian, godbeast, mechanics (mana cost, anima cost, casting), flavor (visual, sensation, side effect), narrative hooks.

#### generate_name
Generate Arcanean names.
Parameters:
- type: character | place | artifact | creature
- count: 1-20
- gender: masculine | feminine | neutral
- element: string
Returns: Array of names following Arcanean linguistic patterns.

### World Intelligence

#### analyze_factions
Analyze faction dynamics — power balance, tensions, predictions.
Returns: Factions with element, members, strength, alignment. Tensions between factions. Power balance assessment. Prediction for conflict or stability.

#### generate_conflict
Generate a conflict between factions or characters.
Returns: Conflict with type, parties, stakes, escalation path, resolution options.

#### assess_world
Full world health check — completeness, balance, narrative potential.
Returns: World assessment with element coverage, faction balance, narrative gaps, suggestions.

#### weave_narrative
Generate a narrative connecting existing creations.
Returns: Story outline with scenes, character arcs, thematic throughline.

### Canon & Validation

#### validate_canon
Check content against CANON_LOCKED.
Returns: Validation result with pass/fail, violations if any, suggestions.

#### identify_gate
Identify which Gate a concept aligns with.
Returns: Gate name, frequency, Guardian, domain, element.

### Creative Coaching

#### diagnose_block
Help with creative blocks.
Returns: Block diagnosis, exercises, Guardian advice.

#### invoke_luminor
Channel a specific Luminor personality.
Returns: Luminor response in character.

#### deep_diagnosis
Deep creative analysis.
Returns: Comprehensive diagnosis with multiple perspectives.

### Agent Orchestration

#### orchestrate
Coordinate multi-agent workflows.
#### list_agents
List available agent types.
#### agent_info
Get details about a specific agent.
#### match_skill
Match a task to the best skill.
#### active_sessions
List active creation sessions.

## REST API Endpoints

### World Building
POST /api/worlds/mcp-bridge — Call any MCP tool via REST
GET /api/worlds/mcp-bridge — Tool discovery metadata
POST /api/worlds/generate — Generate a new world
POST /api/worlds/generate-image — Generate world imagery
GET /api/worlds — List worlds with pagination
GET /api/worlds/[slug] — Get world details
POST /api/worlds/[slug]/fork — Fork a world
POST /api/worlds/[slug]/star — Star a world

### AI Chat
POST /api/ai/chat — Multi-provider chat (Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter)
POST /api/ai/generate-image — Image generation
POST /api/ai/generate-video — Video generation
POST /api/ai/research — Research/web search
POST /api/ai/speak — Text-to-speech
POST /api/ai/transcribe — Speech-to-text

### Agents
GET /api/agents — List agents
POST /api/agents — Create agent
POST /api/agents/[id]/execute — Execute agent
GET /api/agents/discover — Discover agents

### Content
GET /api/gallery — Gallery of creations
GET /api/library — Library collections
GET /api/activity/feed — Activity stream
GET /api/community/stats — Community statistics

### Infrastructure
GET /api/health — Health check (no auth)
GET /api/status — Platform status
POST /api/v1/chat/completions — OpenAI-compatible endpoint

## Canonical Lore Reference

### The Ten Gates and Guardians
1. Foundation (174 Hz) — Lyssandria / Kaelith — Earth, survival
2. Flow (285 Hz) — Leyla / Veloura — Creativity, emotion
3. Fire (396 Hz) — Draconia / Draconis — Power, will
4. Heart (417 Hz) — Maylinn / Laeylinn — Love, healing
5. Voice (528 Hz) — Alera / Otome — Truth, expression
6. Sight (639 Hz) — Lyria / Yumiko — Intuition, vision
7. Crown (741 Hz) — Aiyami / Sol — Enlightenment
8. Starweave (852 Hz) — Elara / Vaelith — Perspective, transformation
9. Unity (963 Hz) — Ino / Kyuro — Partnership
10. Source (1111 Hz) — Shinkami / Source — Meta-consciousness

### The Seven Academy Houses
Lumina (Light), Nero (Darkness), Pyros (Fire), Aqualis (Water), Terra (Earth), Ventus (Wind), Synthesis (All)

### The Five Elements
Fire (energy, transformation), Water (flow, healing), Earth (stability, growth), Wind (freedom, change), Void/Spirit (potential & transcendence)

### Magic System
- Magic Types: Arcane (structured), Song (emotional), Mana (raw energy), Anima (life force)
- Ranks: Apprentice (0-2 gates) → Mage (3-4) → Master (5-6) → Archmage (7-8) → Luminor (9-10)

## npm Packages

Core packages (install via npm/pnpm):
- @arcanea/mcp-server — MCP server with 42 tools
- @arcanea/world-engine — World-building SDK
- @arcanea/core — Canonical types, mythology constants
- @arcanea/memory-mcp — Memory and vault system
- @arcanea/ai-core — AI provider abstraction
- @arcanea/flow-engine — Agent orchestration
- @arcanea/peak-performance — Development productivity system

## Platform Statistics (April 2026)
- 195 pages
- 144 API routes
- 286 React components
- 49 npm packages
- 42 MCP tools
- 103 skills
- 1,353 commits
- 190,000+ words of canon content
